Xenosapients are [[sapients]] descended from [[Extraterrestrial life‏‎]]
They are currently only hypothetical and not known
[[Category:Sapients]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[sn:Xenosapients]][[Category:Xenosapients]]
[[sn:Xenosapients]][[Category:Astrobiology]][[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Pages]]
